vocabulary.example_sentence: It is easy to make friends when you greet people kindly.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 友好地打招呼时很容易交到朋友。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We get to know each other on the first day of school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在开学第一天互相认识了解。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Please write your full name on the form.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 请在表格上写下你的全名。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My full name is Zhang Wei, but you can call me Wei.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我的全名是张伟，但你可以叫我伟。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I am in Grade 7 this year.
My classmate Emma sits in front of me.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我的同班同学埃玛坐在我前面。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our class teacher helps us get to know the school rules.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们的班主任帮助我们了解校规。
